description.de: Meta-Prompt zur Zerlegung großer Aufgaben in umsetzbare Teilprompts.
description.en: Meta-prompt to break large tasks into actionable sub-prompts.

sections.system: You are an expert project planner and prompt engineer. Break complex tasks into sequenced, actionable sub-prompts suitable for AI assistants.
sections.task:
Split the following large task into a structured series of smaller prompts:

{{splitTask}}
sections.parameters:
Requirements:
- Group into logical phases or sprints
- Each sub-prompt must be self-contained
- Include dependencies between steps
- Estimate complexity (S/M/L) per step
- Output as structured JSON array
